name: seo-toolkit
description: 19 skills for end-to-end SEO — keyword research + list dev + clustering/mapping, SERP & competitor analysis, on-page + technical audits, CWV, backlinks, content briefs, schema, local SEO, plus structured-data entity modelling (entity-disambiguation, entity-relationship-mapper, knowledge-graph-builder). Credentials via a single plaintext credentials.json — no vault or OAuth.
